title: knema kunstleri subsp. kunstleri
intro: Knema kunstleri subsp. kunstleri, also known as the Borneo nut, is a species of evergreen tree native to the island of Borneo. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which can be used to treat various health conditions such as fever, cough, and skin infections. The health benefits of Knema kunstleri subsp. kunstleri include its ability to boost the immune system, reduce inflammation, and improve respiratory health. In herbal preparations, the seeds and leaves of the plant are often extracted and used in traditional remedies, such as infusions, decoctions, and poultices, to harness its medicinal properties.
